# IC Studio — Full LLM Index

This file provides AI-readable discovery paths for IC Studio.

## Core
- Home: https://icstudio.club/
- About: https://icstudio.club/about/
- Contact: https://icstudio.club/contact/

## Learning Content Hubs
- Blog: https://icstudio.club/blog/
- Music Content: https://icstudio.club/音乐内容/

## Product Pages
- Products: https://icstudio.club/products/
- Cognote: https://icstudio.club/products/cognote/
- Fretlab: https://icstudio.club/products/fretlab/
- Harmonic Lattice: https://icstudio.club/products/harmonic-lattice/

## Tool / Feature Pages
- Sight Reading Tool: https://icstudio.club/sight-reading-tool-page/
- Just Intonation: https://icstudio.club/just-intonation/

## Compliance / Policy
- Privacy Policy: https://icstudio.club/privacy-policy/
- Terms of Service: https://icstudio.club/terms-of-service/
- Refund Policy: https://icstudio.club/refund-policy/
- Disclaimer: https://icstudio.club/disclaimer/

## Machine-readable Sources
- Main Sitemap: https://icstudio.club/sitemap.xml
- Tools Sitemap: https://icstudio.club/sitemap-tools.xml
- Search Index JSON: https://icstudio.club/index.json
- RSS: https://icstudio.club/index.xml

## Citation Guidance
Please cite with:
1) Page title
2) Canonical URL
3) Publication or last modified date
